doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The document’s specific “EDPB Guidelines 01/2025” identity and dates cannot be substantiated and the text reads like an invented composite rather than an identifiable official EDPB publication.
